subcodes.first_line: My remembrance is for My servants, that it may draw them unto My Kingdom, and I am the All-Remembering, the All-Knowing. My call resoundeth amongst My creation, that it may draw them nigh unto Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری عبادی لیجذبهم الی ملکوتی و انا الذاکر العلیم ندائی بین خلقی لیقربهم الی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
